item.title: I'm a straight male, mostly white and mostly young. The folks giving up on politics disappoint me.
item.description: My friends' safety is not negotiable. Neither is the safety of the stranger I've never met. I wish there was an activist organisation nearby I could join.

item.title: I have a feeling female gun ownership is about to skyrocket
item.description: In 2020 I had a lot of friend’s of friend’s contact me about getting a gun. On Wednesday I had people start contacting me again, mostly females. If any of you are good people have questions let me know and I’ll make more posts.
item.dc:creator: superscout0233

item.title: PSA to all writers on Imgur using MS Word
item.description: I don't care if you're writing the world's greatest novel, My Little Pony/Sonic the Hedgehog crossover fan fiction, or anything else. Your work is YOUR work.

item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Fuck kidney stones….
item.description: This is my 3rd time dealing with kidney stones… It sucks! On the upside, living in Japan healthcare is crazy affordable! X-rays, ultrasound test, a few more other medical tests, & 2 weeks of prescription painkillers cost me under $40! Have a great day on Imgur & Love from Japan!
item.dc:creator: Come2Japan

item.description: If you're like me and live on the internet, you've probably seen most of these. For everyone else...enjoy.
item.dc:creator: helljack

item.title: Why him?!
item.description: I don't even know if this is anything I should post or not. Maybe I'll delete it after I wake up tomorrow. It really says it all. I got the news over 15 hours ago. My heart is torn apart, but I can't seem to shed a tear for more than a minute. I want to cry, but I can't. I loved him so much! Sorry, I just need to vent for people I don't know. I can't call anyone because everyone I know loved him as much as I do, and I've talked to a fair few of them on the phone today. Maybe this shout to strangers is the release I need. I don't know. I feel so fucking empty. I hate that I can't cry for him. He was the greatest person I've ever met. He welcomed me when I didn't feel like I had any friends. I've met the best people, thanks to him. And before anyone assumes anything, it was a workplace accident, and not self inflicted. Sorry for taking up your time. I need to vent. Go on with your day. I really do hope it's better than mine. EDIT: Thank you, everyone. You made me feel better about it, and not like a shit person. Thank you
item.dc:creator: Sigge1981

item.title: Memes, gags, and facepalms for the day
item.description: Some assorted stuff for the Internet at large. Edit: Oh dear. I was NOT prepared for this to go viral. I do not know what to think, and my brain is mush.
item.dc:creator: DuskEmber

item.title: Painting myself as a Weeping Angel - MCroft07
item.description: A lot of people seemed to like my weeping angel so I thought I'd post it here too :) Thanks to the people who are super kind and not inappropriate on my posts, it's appreciated. Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror It's from doctor who: blink I use professional body paint covers I paint these by looking in a mirror It takes between 6-10 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.description: Google Translate.- Taking advantage under the stairs
item.dc:creator: exploradoresciclos2018

item.title: My sweet rat Coffee trying out some tricks in her Pikachu costume!
item.description: Coffee trying on the Pikachu costume - its a lot stiffer than the other costumes she's tried due to the felt I used being a different type, so it felt a bit different to her. But she still did a great job, and in typical Coffee fashion gave it her all! Great job Coffee! . Want help with training your rats tricks? I have a rat training book available here! https://www.etsy.com/listing/1605480026/the-ultimate-guide-to-rat-training
item.dc:creator: ShadowtheRat

item.dc:creator: wseslar

item.title: Broken back and foot but happier than I have been in a decade!
item.description: I was smilingly like this before the pain medication was given so don’t try to sass haha. Genuinely happier than ever even with the amount of complications and pain involved. I’d break my back willingly 1000x more than forget what real laughter felt like again.
item.dc:creator: orangefirefly
